page.title: Dashboard
page.description: Operations dashboard for purchasing, warehouse, package billing, shipping, finance, API health, and risk exceptions.

pendingPurchase.title: Pending purchase orders
pendingPurchase.description: Paid orders waiting for purchasing staff.

overduePurchase.description: Paid for more than 24 hours and still not purchased.

warehouseAbnormal.title: Warehouse abnormal
warehouseAbnormal.description: Inbound mismatches, damage, restricted goods, and missing items.

waitingShippingPayment.title: Waiting shipping payment
waitingShippingPayment.description: Packages with generated international shipping bills.

readyToShip.title: Ready to ship
readyToShip.description: Shipping paid packages waiting for dispatch.

shippingExceptions.title: Shipping exceptions
shippingExceptions.description: Carrier exceptions and stale tracking records.

apiErrors.title: API errors
apiErrors.description: Recent product/search API failures that need fallback handling.

tasks.emptyDescription: There are no operational tasks for the selected range.
tasks.emptyQueueDescription: This queue is clear for the selected range.

errors.loadDescription: The mock API request failed. Retry after confirming the admin session is active.

charts.emptyFooter: Connect `/api/admin/dashboard/stats` when real operational data is ready.

ordersTrend.title: Orders trend
ordersTrend.description: Created, paid, and completed orders across the selected period.

paidAmountTrend.title: Paid amount trend
paidAmountTrend.description: Product payment, international shipping, recharge, and refunds.

orderStatus.description: Purchasing-agent workflow states, including abnormal and refund states.

orderSource.description: How users entered the purchasing flow.

apiHealth.title: API health
apiHealth.description: OneBound calls by success rate, latency, error reason, and endpoint type.

riskAlerts.title: Risk alerts
riskAlerts.description: Restricted goods, high-value orders, payment exceptions, and risky users.
